Plumbing.title: Plumbing triage SOP
content: Confirm whether water is actively flowing, spreading, or damaging finishes.
If the resident can safely access the local shut-off valve, ask them to isolate the fixture.
Escalate immediately when water ingress affects electrics or multiple apartments.

Electrical.title: Electrical triage SOP
content: Check for sparking, burning smell, exposed wiring, or complete power loss.
Do not ask residents to reset breakers if there is any sign of heat or burning.
Treat life-safety and whole-unit outages as immediate dispatch scenarios.

HVAC.title: HVAC triage SOP
content: Confirm whether cooling or heating is fully unavailable and how many rooms are impacted.
Prioritize vulnerable residents and extreme weather conditions.
Capture any leaking condensate or tripped safety faults for the vendor handoff.

Appliances.title: Appliance triage SOP
content: Confirm the appliance type, failure state, and whether water is trapped or leaking.
If the issue risks flooding, isolate water and treat as urgent.
Document the last successful cycle or visible error indication.

Security.title: Security triage SOP
content: Confirm whether the property can currently be secured.
Any failed lock or door access issue affecting security should be treated as urgent or emergency.
Capture access instructions and whether the resident can remain safely inside.

General.title: General maintenance triage SOP
content: Capture the resident impact, safety concerns, and any temporary workaround already attempted.
Collect photos or supporting detail when available.
Route to the most likely trade based on resident impact and affected asset.

Plumbing.title: Licensed plumber routing
conditions: Use a licensed plumber for leak, blockage, burst pipe, or fixture isolation issues.
After-hours active leaks should go to the on-call plumbing partner.

Electrical.title: Licensed electrician routing
conditions: Use a licensed electrician for power, outlet, breaker, switch, or lighting safety faults.
Whole-unit outage or burning smell requires immediate escalation.

HVAC.title: HVAC vendor routing
conditions: Use the preferred HVAC contractor for cooling, heating, or ventilation failures.
After-hours dispatch is reserved for vulnerable residents or critical business impact.

Appliances.title: Appliance technician routing
conditions: Use appliance care vendors for dishwasher, oven, fridge, washer, and dryer failures.
If water cannot be contained, involve plumbing support as well.

Security.title: Security and locksmith routing
conditions: Use the locksmith or security contractor when the property cannot be secured.
After-hours lock failures should go straight to the emergency security roster.

General.title: General maintenance routing
conditions: Use the general maintenance team when the issue does not clearly map to a specialist trade.
Escalate to a specialist vendor once photos or additional detail narrow the diagnosis.

emergency_policy.title: Emergency maintenance policy
content: Treat incidents as emergency when there is immediate safety risk, uncontrolled water ingress, complete power loss, fire, gas smell, or the property cannot be secured.
Emergency items should trigger immediate on-call dispatch and a resident acknowledgement without waiting for business hours.
Record the triggering condition so human reviewers can confirm why the item bypassed the normal queue.

Harbour View Residences.title: Harbour View Residences notes
content: After-hours access is through the concierge desk and requires the work order reference.
Wet-area shut-off valves are located in the service riser cupboard outside each apartment.

Elm Street Townhomes.title: Elm Street Townhomes notes
content: Security issues should note whether the resident is in a front or rear-entry townhouse.
Preferred locksmith response is via the emergency security roster after business hours.

Cityscape Lofts.title: Cityscape Lofts notes
content: Appliance vendors must book loading dock access for large replacements.
Residents should be asked whether the intercom is needed for technician entry.
